category_sources: source_facts.description says it shares one language instance between multiple LSP clients; source_facts.executables lists lspmux.

repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is an official Codeberg source-control project URL; source_facts.source-archive is from the same Codeberg repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies LSP multiplexing; source_facts.executables lists a command-line executable.
